description.overview: A powerful Belgian farm dog, the Bouvier is a loyal, protective companion. They're gentle with family but can be reserved with strangers.
description.history: The Bouvier des Flandres originated in Belgium/France.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, protective, strong-willed.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their rough, tousled, double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A powerful Belgian farm dog, the Bouvier is a loyal, protective companion. They're gentle with family but can be reserved with strangers.
